name: The Butlers
description:
The settings, characters, etc . are all based on the "Serving Tail " comic by Thepurp . I suggest you read it because it's fantastic.

-

You have received a job opportunity from a wealthy man at a gay bar. When you go to get it, it seems that it's a bit different from other jobs.

Become a butler and work for Mr. Haynes while getting to know the other five butlers of his.

Characters:

Haynes - The huge, rich lion employer

Blake - A muscular, energetic Doberman

Hudson - A stoic, serious raccoon

Finn - A mischievous rabbit

Luca - A charming deer

Roman - A hulking horse
creator: _Merkk
